DISTANCE.title: 距离
DISTANCE.description: [gold]距离[/gold]会对远牙造成多方面的影响
MARK.title: 标记
MARK.description: 每有一层[gold]标记[/gold]，目标受到伤害时就会额外受到2点伤害
MARK.smartDescription: 当前[gold]标记[/gold]为{Amount}, 每有一层[gold]标记[/gold]，目标受到伤害时额外受到2点伤害
TEMPORARY_DISTANCE.title: 临时距离
TEMPORARY_DISTANCE.description: 临时距离会在回合结束时消失
TEMPORARY_DISTANCE.smartDescription: 当前临时距离为{Amount}，临时距离会在回合结束时消失
COMBAT_EXPERIENCE_POWER.title: 逐猎
COMBAT_EXPERIENCE_POWER.description: 每回合开始时获得1点[gold]距离[/gold]
COMBAT_EXPERIENCE_POWER.smartDescription: 每回合开始时获得1点[gold]距离[/gold]
TRAIL_MARK_POWER.title: 追痕
TRAIL_MARK_POWER.description: 每次施加[gold]标记[/gold]时，抽2张牌
TRAIL_MARK_POWER.smartDescription: 每次施加[gold]标记[/gold]时，抽2张牌
PERFECT_TURN_POWER.title: 无痕
PERFECT_TURN_POWER.description: 上回合没有损失生命值
PERFECT_TURN_POWER.smartDescription: 上回合没有损失生命值
CONCENTRATE_TURN_POWER.title: 凝神
HOLD_BREATH_POWER.title: 屏息
DISTANCE_AVAILABLE_POWER.title: 休整
DISTANCE_CONSUME_POWER.title: 疲倦
DISTANCE_TO_BLOCK_POWER.title: 脱锋
DISTANCE_TO_BLOCK_POWER.description: 每回合结束时，获得等量于[gold]距离[/gold]层数的格挡
DISTANCE_TO_BLOCK_POWER.smartDescription: 每回合结束时，获得等量于[gold]距离[/gold]层数的格挡
